sources.name: Budapest Convention on Cybercrime (ETS 185)
sources.completeness_note: Full text of all 48 articles across 4 chapters

sources.name: UN Convention against Cybercrime (2024)
sources.completeness_note: Full text of all 62 articles adopted December 2024

sources.name: Tallinn Manual 2.0
sources.completeness_note: Rule summaries only — full text is copyrighted by Cambridge University Press

sources.name: UN GGE/OEWG Consensus Norms
sources.completeness_note: All 11 GGE 2015 norms, GGE 2021 reaffirmation, OEWG outcomes, and Paris Call principles

sources.name: NATO and EU Cyber Policy
sources.authority: NATO / Council of the European Union
sources.completeness_note: Key provisions from NATO cyber defence policy (2014-2023) and EU Cyber Diplomacy Toolbox (2017-2023)

sources.name: US Cybersecurity Executive Orders and CISA Act
sources.authority: President of the United States / US Congress
sources.completeness_note: Key sections from EO 14028, EO 13800, and CISA Act 2018

sources.name: Wassenaar Arrangement Category 5 Part 2
sources.completeness_note: Dual-use information security controls. Does not include full munitions list.

sources.name: National Cybersecurity Strategies
sources.completeness_note: Strategy metadata and key objectives for 54 countries. Full text not included.

gaps.description: Tallinn Manual 2.0 contains rule summaries, not full text
gaps.reason: Full text is copyrighted by Cambridge University Press

gaps.description: National strategies include metadata and key objectives, not full strategy text
gaps.reason: Full strategy documents are lengthy PDFs in various languages

gaps.description: Budapest Convention Additional Protocols not included as separate entries
gaps.reason: Protocol content partially covered in main convention articles

gaps.description: EU NIS2 Directive not included (covered by comprehensive-eu-law-mcp)
gaps.reason: Scope limited to international treaties and norms, not EU directives

gaps.description: Only Category 5 Part 2 of Wassenaar Arrangement included
gaps.reason: Other categories less relevant to cybersecurity

tools.name: search_cybersecurity_law
tools.description: FTS5 search across all treaty articles, manual rules, and policy provisions

tools.name: get_treaty_article
tools.description: Retrieve a specific article from a treaty by source ID and article number

tools.name: get_treaty
tools.description: Get treaty metadata with article count and chapter breakdown

tools.name: get_national_cyber_strategy
tools.description: Get a national cybersecurity strategy by country code or name

tools.name: compare_national_strategies
tools.description: Compare cybersecurity strategies of multiple countries

tools.name: get_incident_reporting_requirements
tools.description: Search for incident reporting obligations across treaties

tools.name: get_attribution_framework
tools.description: Get state attribution rules from Tallinn Manual and related sources

tools.name: map_cyber_norms
tools.description: Get international cyber norms by category

tools.name: get_export_controls
tools.description: Search export control regimes by item or category

tools.name: build_legal_stance
tools.description: Aggregate provisions across all sources for a cybersecurity law question

tools.name: validate_citation
tools.description: Validate a citation to a specific treaty article

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: List all data sources with provenance metadata and record counts

tools.name: about
tools.description: Server metadata, data coverage, and disclaimer

tools.name: check_data_freshness
tools.description: Check database build date, schema version, and record counts
